input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.1.1
            TITLE: any driver equipment:

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.1.1: Any Driver Equipment:
VE.3.1.1 Any Driver Equipment: 
a. Must be in good condition with no tears, rips, open seams, areas of significant wear, 
abrasions or stains which might compromise performance.  
b. Must fit properly  
c. May be inspected at any time

final_answer: rule VE.3.1.1: Any Driver Equipment: VE.3.1.1 Any Driver Equipment: a. Must be in good condition with no tears, rips, open seams, areas of significant wear, abrasions or stains which might compromise performance. b. Must fit properly c. May be inspected at any time
